_comment: Merge the hooks block below into ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace YOUR_DISCORD_USER_ID with your numeric Discord user ID (or remove ' YOUR_DISCORD_USER_ID' from a hook to post without pinging). The activity hooks need no user ID (that feed never pings). Requires bash, curl, and jq on the machine. The Notification matcher whitelists the notification_type values that mean Claude needs you: tool/permission prompts (which also cover AskUserQuestion and plan-mode), MCP elicitation dialogs, and idle_prompt (the ~60s 'waiting for your input' signal for when Claude is finished/stuck and it's your turn). There is intentionally NO Stop hook (turn-end is not a needs-input signal). For hard-blocks-only, remove idle_prompt.
